sentences.english: I hate saying goodbye at airports.
I always cry, even if it's just a short trip.
I prefer Irish goodbye — just leaving without telling anyone, because it avoids all the awkwardness.
sentences.korean: 아이리시 굿바이를 선호해요 — 아무에게도 안 말하고 떠나기요. 모든 어색함을 피할 수 있어서요.

sentences.english: In Korean culture, we walk guests to the door or even to their car, because it shows respect.
sentences.korean: 한국 문화에서는 손님을 문까지 혹은 차까지 배웅해요. 존경을 보여주는 거니까요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
